title: Seek Statement
parameters:
fileNumber	Integer expression from 30 ~ 63

pointer	Integer expression for the desired position to seek, starting from 0 to the length of the file.
description:
Seek Statement

Seek Statement

See_Also Example

Changes position of file pointer for a specified file.
see_also:
BOpen

Read

ROpen

UOpen

Write

WOpen

Seek Statement Example

Integer fileNum

		String data$

		fileNumber = FreeFile

		UOpen "TEST.DAT" As #fileNum

Seek #fileNum, 20

		Read #fileNum, data$, 2

		Close #fileNum
examples:
Integer fileNum
		String data$
		fileNumber = FreeFile
		UOpen "TEST.DAT" As #fileNum

			Seek #fileNum, 20
		Read #fileNum, data$, 2
		Close #fileNum
